title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE NAPOLAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ“ BUENAVISTA ANNEX IN BARANGAY BUENAVISTA, CITY OF PAGADIAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR FROM THE NAPOLAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS NORBERTA GUILLAR MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
108 OG No. 50, 6320 (December 10, 2012)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10214, October 18, 2012 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE NAPOLAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ“ BUENAVISTA ANNEX IN BARANGAY BUENAVISTA, CITY OF PAGADIAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR FROM THE NAPOLAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS NORBERTA GUILLAR MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

ГўВЂВ“ The Napolan National High SchoolГўВЂВ“Buenavista Annex in Barangay Buenavista, City of Pagadian, Province of Zamboanga del Sur is hereby separated from the Napolan National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Norberta Guillar Memorial National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

ГўВЂВ“ All personnel, records, assets and liabilities of the Napolan National High SchoolГўВЂВ“Buenavista Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Norberta Guillar Memorial National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations. ГўВЂВ“

The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the DepartmentГўВЂВ™s program the operationalization of the Norberta Guillar Memorial National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current yearГўВЂВ™s appropriation of the Napolan National High SchoolГўВЂВ“Buenavista Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation. ГўВЂВ“

The Secretary of Education shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity. ГўВЂВ“

This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 22, 2011 and July 24, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

OCT 18 2012

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
